name: Mac or PC? Windows Security Issues Help Some Users Choose
description: USA Today columnist Kevin Maney examines whether Windows security woes will drive a switch to Mac. Symantec found 5,000 new Windows viruses in H1 2004; Apple's Mac OS X has had no major virus. Industry analysts including Peter Kastner of Vericours doubt this shifts business buying because switching costs are 'huge and potentially career-threatening for most CIOs.' Individuals, however, may consider Macs.
